events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young and still drumming! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! From stadium-rocking riffs to actual astrophysics, the man is a legend.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years old and still moving like that! Sending big birthday wishes to rock 'n' roll icon Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video aired.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched and ironically kicked off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The music world was never the same again.

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on this day in 1994, propelling them to Britpop stardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: A quarter-century ago today, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. Still sounds as fresh and rebellious as it did in '94. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the King of Rock and Roll, passed away on this day in 1977; he would have been 91.

angles.name: King Forever
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. Forty-nine years since Elvis Presley left the building, but his music continues to rock the world.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot on September 7, 1996, and died six days later on September 13; he would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years since the tragic loss of a hip-hop icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur, whose powerful lyrics and legacy continue to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away on this day in 1970; he would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the music world lost a true visionary. Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' in 1969
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road', featuring its legendary zebra crossing cover, was released on this day in the UK in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous photographs in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The fierce and iconic frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock 'n' roll original who continues to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Fifty-four years of pure rock 'n' roll attitude! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' re-released in 1975
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was re-released in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Forty-nine years ago, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was re-released, spreading its message of peace around the world.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: Apple unveiled its revolutionary first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember life before? Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod arrived and put a thousand songs in our pocket. A true game-changer.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day marks the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years of 007, iconic gadgets, thrilling chases, and those unforgettable theme tunes.

events.title: John Lennon turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary musician, singer, and songwriter John Lennon would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace live on.
